description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a containerVersion variable set to stable and stages build-container, build, test, deploy, and update-container. In the build-container stage add a docker:image job using the docker:1.13 image with a docker:dind service that runs "docker version", "docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build:latest ./cicd/testImage", "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", and "docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build", and only runs when the variable $rebuildDocker equals "True". In the test stage define build_visplayrenderer_linux (image registry.gitlab.com/coloradoschoolofmines/visplay/build:$containerVersion) executing "cd /builds/ColoradoSchoolOfMines/visplay/visplayrenderer/", "meson build", "cd build", "ninja"; build_visplayrenderer_windows (image python:alpine) that creates "./cicd/azure_forwarding/artifacts", installs azure-devops via "pip3 install azure-devops", runs "python3 ./cicd/azure_forwarding/azure_build.py", publishes artifacts from "cicd/azure_forwarding/artifacts/*" and runs only on master; lint_js (image node) with before_script "cd visplay/frontend" and "npm install" then script "npm run lint"; lint_python (image python:3.7-alpine, allow_failure) with before_script "apk add gcc musl-dev" and "pip install -r requirements.txt" then script "flake8 --version" and "flake8"; and test_python (image python:3.6-alpine) with before_script "apk add mpv make gcc musl-dev", "pip3 install -r requirements.txt", "pip install ." and script "make doctest". In the deploy stage add a pages job using the registry.gitlab.com/coloradoschoolofmines/visplay/build:$containerVersion image that runs "./cicd/pages/before_script.sh" then "./cicd/pages/script.sh", publishes the "public" directory as an artifact, and only runs on master. In the update-container stage add a pushdocker:image job (docker:1.13 with docker:dind) that runs "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build:latest", "docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build:latest $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build:stable", "docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/build:stable" and only when $rebuildDocker == "True", and also add a serverdocker:image job (docker:1.13 with docker:dind) in the deploy stage that runs "docker version", "docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/server:stable ./cicd/serverImage", "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", "docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/server:stable" and runs on master or the Server-Docker-CICD branch.
